title: Idempotent Push: FindOrCreate for Sync Adapters
summary: Adds a FindOrCreate method to sync adapters to prevent duplicate external items when CreateSyncMapping fails after Push.
notes: Located under docs/superpowers/specs/ with date-prefixed filename (not conventional ADR path/naming), but content has Status: Approved plus Problem/Decision/Scope sections matching ADR structure; classified as ADR over SPEC due to explicit single locked decision framing.
